name: Track Anarchy
description: Take the guardrails off. Track Anarchy removes Subway Builder's construction limits for every train type: minimum curve radius (track and stations), maximum grade, track/station/tunnel clearance, minimum parallel-track spacing, the build-height floor and ceiling, the building-foundation gap, minimum and maximum station lengths, minimum and maximum track segment lengths, and at-grade road-crossing barriers. A few rules stay hardcoded and can't be removed — stations must start and end level, different track types can't connect, there's no building or track overlap, and airport runways/taxiways still block at-grade crossings. Built on the official modding API; turn it off anytime to return to vanilla.
